title: release-new-version
outOfScope: Publishing before required evidence is bound

sources.reason: Work Item 13 release sequencing and evidence requirements.

riskAssessment.reason: Release metadata must bind to the latest main commit and preserve the enterprise-security boundary.

executionDecision.reason: Release source commit, tag metadata, and evidence boundary are declared.

preReviewWarnings: Verify SOURCE_COMMIT equals latest origin/main before release evidence is finalized.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Release metadata advances to the new version and binds to the latest main commit.
Release documentation identifies tag, detached source commit, and evidence boundary.
Release validation checks pass or unavailable external assets are explicitly recorded.
The release does not claim enterprise security NO-GO has changed.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: All remediation PRs are merged, but a final release must bind immutable source, tag, and distribution evidence without overstating security guarantees.
constraints: Use latest origin/main as source commit.
Do not change enterprise security NO-GO.
intent.rationale: A governed release record closes the remediation cycle and makes the released source auditable.

declaredIntent.summary: Publish the next release from latest main with bound evidence.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Release source commit equals latest main
Unavailable external release evidence is not overclaimed

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
